ogTitle: Peats Ridge vs Pebbly Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Peats Ridge and Pebbly Beach.
heading: Peats Ridge vs Pebbly Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Peats Ridge, New South Wales and Pebbly Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pebbly Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Peats Ridge (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Peats Ridge or Pebbly Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Peats Ridge has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Pebbly Beach scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Peats Ridge scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Pebbly Beach scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Peats Ridge or Pebbly Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pebbly Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
